raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding an unreasonable and excessive delay in receiving a fraud-related credit balance refund on my JetBlue Barclays credit card.

I paid my account balance in full on XX/XX/XXXX. Shortly thereafter, I discovered fraudulent charges on my account. Barclays confirmed the fraud and reversed the charges, resulting in a credit balance of approximately {$1200.00} owed to me. 



Despite providing my correct New York mailing address multiple times, Barclays failed to update the address in its system. I was informed that a refund check would be issued, only to later learn that it was not processed due to Barclays internal error. As a result, the refund timeline was restarted for an additional 710 business days.

My most recent call with Barclays occurred on XX/XX/XXXX. Had I not proactively followed up, I would not have been informed of this delay. I have now waited several weeks for funds that are rightfully mine, and this delay is entirely due to Barclays internal processing failures. 



I am requesting immediate issuance of my refund via expedited delivery and written confirmation of resolution.
